description_long: This is a modern, flat-roofed house surrounded by a low boundary wall and landscaped with several trees. The structure features large glass windows and sliding doors, providing ample natural light and a seamless connection between indoor and outdoor spaces. The house includes a spacious wooden deck, an outdoor pool, and multiple patio areas for relaxation and entertainment. The exterior combines light-colored concrete or stucco with wood paneling, giving it a sleek, contemporary appearance. The property is designed with open-plan living in mind, and the main entrance is set back from the street, accessible via a paved driveway. The landscaping is minimalistic, with a mix of green lawns, shrubs, and mature trees enhancing the modern aesthetic.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with large glass windows, wood paneling, a spacious deck, and an outdoor pool, surrounded by a low wall and landscaped with trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large glass facade, driveway, and a covered patio area with outdoor seating.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the wooden deck, pool area, and the rear facade with minimal windows and a private backyard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the pool, expansive deck, and the back of the house with sliding glass doors opening to the outdoor space.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the deck, secondary entrance, and additional landscaping with trees and shrubs.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and sliding glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a wide glass door, paved approach, and a covered patio with minimalistic design elements.
